name: project-protocol
description: Project session discipline plugin. Three-folder layout (cowork, agents, human) with root CLAUDE.md as the always-loaded brain. 16 skills including migrate-project, build-page, build-component, marketing-brief, design-direction, design-check with auto-fix, and edit-plugin self-discipline gate. 9 hook events including PostToolUse design-scan and SessionStart drift-detector. Per-release migration manifests. Compatible with Claude Code and Codex.
